record.text:
stratification — rate as thickness.

bifurcation diagram with dwell-time weighting. where the orbit slows (near fold points, at bifurcations), layers accumulate and glow. the stratification IS the perturbation — not added from outside.

images.alt: bifurcation diagram of the logistic map from r=2.8 to r=4.0, rendered with magma colormap on black background. bright magenta bands show where the orbit lingers near fold points, forming stratified layers through the period-doubling cascade and into chaos.
